# conv

Renders `<conv>conv-xxx-yyy</conv>` inline as a clickable chip that opens
the referenced conversation in the right side pane (alongside the host
conversation, URL `/c/<host>/c/<side>`) via `convSidePane`. Falls back to
navigating full-screen to `/c/<id>` when the chip is rendered outside a
conversation context or self-references the host. Resolves the title and
current status via `useConversationById`; falls back to the raw id if the
conversation isn't in the index yet.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders <conv>conv-xxx</conv> as a clickable chip that opens the referenced conversation in the right side pane alongside the host conversation.
- Contributes:
  - `ActiveData.Tag` → `ConvChip`
